# Athelas

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Dúnedain_** or **_Healer_** character.
**Action:** Discard Athelas and exhaust attached character to heal all damage on a character. You may discard a **_Condition_** attachment from that character.

---

> *"...it is a healing plant that the Men of the West brought to Middle-earth. Athelas they named it..."*
> — Aragorn, The Fellowship of the Ring

**Pack:** [[The Lost Realm]] #11
